name: Vexation
description:
Vexation is a Maliwan SMG variant that always rolls with a fixed-element Maliwan barrel. This gives it above-average elemental damage over time and a higher status chance than typical SMGs. Fitting a Maliwan grip can boost those elemental stats further.

Although it is not a high-rarity drop, its strong proc rate and DoT output can carry you effectively until you find a more specialised or rarer option.
notes:
Related fixed-element Maliwan SMGs include Provacateur (incendiary), Venom (corrosive), Revenant (slag), and Hyperborean (cryo).

A known generation bug can make some blue versions display purple-style item card title colouring; with Colourblind Mode enabled they may even show as [Purple]. Due to the same issue, blue and purple rolls with identical parts can end up with identical stats.

Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
